task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open and the scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' is loaded, visible in the title bar, Xsheet, or scene browser.

task_completion.description: Select the main character animation level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main character's animation level (e.g., 'A_painted') is selected in the Xsheet, Timeline, or Level Strip.

task_completion.description: Open the dialog to save or export the level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Level As' or export dialog window is open in OpenToonz.

task_completion.description: Set the output directory to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path in the save/export dialog is set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/level_frames/'.

task_completion.description: Set the output format to PNG with alpha transparency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file format dropdown is set to 'png' (or '.png') and the format options/settings explicitly show 'Alpha' or 'RGBA' enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the PNG sequence has been exported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows multiple '.png' files successfully created in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/level_frames/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to export the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the OpenToonz menus and dialogs to export the level, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the images.

integrity.description: The exported images are genuine frames of the character.
integrity.visual_evidence: If thumbnails or image previews are visible, they show the actual 'dwanko' character animation frames, not blank images or placeholders.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy existing files to bypass the export process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen performing the 'Save Level As' or export action within OpenToonz, rather than just using 'cp' or a file manager to move pre-existing PNGs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source scene: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Output directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/level_frames. Expected format: PNG with Alpha (RGBA). Note: The main character animation level ('A_painted') contains exactly 6 distinct frames. A 'Save Level As' operation will yield exactly 6 PNG files, which is the correct behavior and should be accepted despite the task description asking for at least 8.
